documents.title: Weekly Marketing Sync Summary
documents.summary: Agent-generated summary of campaign decisions, blockers, and follow-up tasks from the mock Paperclip run.

content.text:
# Weekly Marketing Sync

## Decisions

- Keep the Q2 campaign brief focused on inbound proof.
- Route unclear task ownership through Review Queue before creating Trello cards.

## Follow-up

1. Prepare campaign brief draft.
2. Confirm landing page owner.
3. Review evidence links before approval.

sourceEvidence.text: We need the campaign brief ready before the next weekly review.

documents.title: Child Agent Execution Notes
documents.summary: Mock child-agent notes showing parent/child traceability without contacting the live Paperclip runtime.

content.text:
# Child Agent Notes

- Verified that the document viewer uses mock fixtures only.
- Preserved the W1 service-auth gate for future live webhook work.
- Left live health path and payload mapping blocked until owner confirmation.

sourceEvidence.text: No live Paperclip endpoint was called for these local artifact notes.
